posts.text:
biden total spend on ukraine: $180 billion

the pentagon just asked for $200 billion for war in iran.
the united states threatening iran with additional destruction is no longer a deterrent for iran’s remaining leaders.

israel: south pars gas field attack made in coordination with united states 

trump: knew nothing about israel strikes
i’ve yet to hear a workable near term (next 4-6 weeks) plan for how to open the strait that doesn’t involve us boots on the ground.
us fallen back to democracy levels of the 1960s

russia sending two shipments of oil. and gas to…cuba. 

will president trump order interdiction? i’d say pretty good chance he will.

consumer sentiment:
republicans: 98.
overall: 56.
democrats: 38.
 
the way people feel about the economy, not quite rationally, has everything to do with who's in the white house.
iranian missile/drone strikes tailed off dramatically after first days of the war. roughly constant over last week plus.

the united states was unhappy with israel’s strikes on tehran oil infrastructure in first days of the war. 

israel attacks on south pars gas field today were apparently coordinated in advance with the united states. 

meaningful escalation in war, expected impact on iran economy. 

how much iran can damage of gcc energy infrastructure in return, we shall see.
gas prices up 29% in 20 days. sharpest spike since hurricane katrina.

trump wants to wrap this up and move on to the next thing.
there is no next thing right now. there are 5,000 troops two weeks from the persian gulf and no off-ramp he can call a win.

Video

iran’s military is getting hit hard.
its asymmetric capabilities are not.
@gzeromedia

Video

this war isn’t about whether the us can win militarily.
it’s about whether the aftermath is manageable.
@gzeromedia

Video
iran exporting more oil now than before the war started. that’s legitimately surprising.

45 million more people pushed into acute hunger if the iran war lasts through june.
the most severe disruption since covid and the ukraine war.
false alarm: us request for allies’ support no longer necessary.
the us diesel average is now above $5 a gallon for only the second time in history.

90% of drinking water in oman, qatar, and kuwait comes from desalination plants. bahrain already had one struck by a drone. jebel ali port — 12 miles from one of the world's largest desalination facilities — has also been hit.
joe kent, director of national counterterrorism center (and strong maga supporter), resigns over iran war.
can’t travel to beijing to meet with xi if it’s right after troops arrive in the persian gulf for a ground incursion.
